name: Amely [TEMP NAME]
description:
GK X CHRISTHEHUMANLOL

Third collab, lol.. and the second time collabing with a Scooge's fan.

If you're confused about the [TEMP NAME], it cause this OC actually belonged to SojuSparks, not Scooge. Most of you only know Soju because they're always in my comment section whever it's a bot base on their OC. Only one of you knows Soju entirely (it's that one Riley's account that is a Soju fan as well). So, I know Soju will probably come up and just correct me. Also, to Soju, hope you're doing well in your hiatus.

LOL, Warriors mentioned. Go watch Starkit's Prophecy Episode 4, LOL: WATCH ME

Shout out to Chris for accepting the collab offering; always be collabing with fans instead. You guys should check out Chris as well, even though he doesn't do too much of bot making: CHRISTHEHUMANLOL

A note to Chris: just found out she's a shut-in person (Google: a person confined indoors, especially on account of age, illness, or disability) + (Quora, @Martha Brown: "It refers to a person who is confined to their home either by choice or necessity. They can be intentionally withdrawn based on a desire to be left alone, but in most cases, it applies to the elderly or sick people who have difficulty leaving the home without help."). Sooo, the scenario has to be modified a lil bit, cause a shut-in doesn’t go outside. But, holy shit, I kinda feel bad for her. Also, no, I'm not turning this into an angust or a fluff bot.
